text: Now faith is assurance of things hoped for, proof of things not seen.
Trust in Yahweh with all your heart, and don’t lean on your own understanding. In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.
for by grace you have been saved through faith, and that not of yourselves; it is the gift of God, not of works, that no one would boast.
Therefore I tell you, all things whatever you pray and ask for, believe that you have received them, and you shall have them.
for we walk by faith, not by sight.

He said to them, “Because of your unbelief. For most certainly I tell you, if you have faith as a grain of mustard seed, you will tell this mountain, ‘Move from here to there,’ and it will move; and nothing will be impossible for you.
So faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of God.
Without faith it is impossible to be well pleasing to him, for he who comes to God must believe that he exists, and that he is a rewarder of those who seek him.
Even so faith, if it has no works, is dead in itself.
Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in hope in the power of the Holy Spirit.

Put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil. For our wrestling is not against flesh and blood, but against the principalities, against the powers, against the world’s rulers of the darkness of this age, and against the spiritual forces of wickedness in the heavenly places.

for the weapons of our warfare are not of the flesh, but mighty before God to the throwing down of strongholds, 5 throwing down imaginations and every high thing that is exalted against the knowledge of God and bringing every thought into captivity to the obedience of Christ,
Be subject therefore to God. Resist the devil, and he will flee from you.

Be sober and self-controlled. Be watchful. Your adversary, the devil, walks around like a roaring lion, seeking whom he may devour. Withstand him steadfast in your faith, knowing that your brothers who are in the world are undergoing the same sufferings.
You are of God, little children, and have overcome them, because greater is he who is in you than he who is in the world.
They overcame him because of the Lamb’s blood, and because of the word of their testimony. They didn’t love their life, even to death.
But the Lord is faithful, who will establish you and guard you from the evil one.
Behold, I give you authority to tread on serpents and scorpions, and over all the power of the enemy. Nothing will in any way hurt you
He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty. I will say of Yahweh, He is my refuge and my fortress; my God, in whom I trust.
No, in all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us.
For God didn’t give us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and self-control.
Wait for Yahweh. Be strong, and let your heart take courage. Yes, wait for Yahweh.
Watch! Stand firm in the faith! Be courageous! Be strong!
Be strong, and let your heart take courage, all you who hope in Yahweh.
When I am afraid, I will put my trust in you.  In God, I praise his word. In God, I put my trust. I will not be afraid. What can flesh do to me?

David said to Solomon his son, “Be strong and courageous, and do it. Don’t be afraid, nor be dismayed, for Yahweh God, even my God, is with you. He will not fail you nor forsake you, until all the work for the service of Yahweh’s house is finished.
Finally, be strong in the Lord and in the strength of his might.
Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in hope in the power of the Holy Spirit.
But as for me, I will look to Yahweh. I will wait for the God of my salvation. My God will hear me.
Not only this, but we also rejoice in our sufferings, knowing that suffering produces perseverance;  and perseverance, proven character; and proven character, hope;
But now faith, hope, and love remain—these three. The greatest of these is love.
rejoicing in hope, enduring in troubles, continuing steadfastly in prayer,
For we were saved in hope, but hope that is seen is not hope. For who hopes for that which he sees? But if we hope for that which we don’t see, we wait for it with patience.
Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who according to his great mercy caused us to be born again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,
